inputs.label: Count of Type A
inputs.businessContext: Number of items in first category

inputs.label: Count of Type B
inputs.businessContext: Number of items in second category

inputs.label: Observed Number of Runs
inputs.businessContext: Total number of runs in the sequence

inputs.label: Significance Level (α)
inputs.businessContext: Type I error threshold for hypothesis test conclusion

formulas.varianceRuns: 2 * countA * countB * (2 * countA * countB - countA - countB) / (Math.pow(countA + countB, 2) * (countA + countB - 1))
formulas.conclusion: pValue < alpha ? 'Reject H0: Data is not random' : 'Do not reject H0: Data may be random'
